reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username through a multi-step process involving account access and API request permissions.
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891: Successfully loaded the Superagent application home page with sidebar visible.
Step 2 - Click agent "QA-20260424-145155-6mnk" in sidebar: Successfully clicked the agent and loaded the agent detail page.
Step 3 - Verify agent status is "running" or "idle": Agent status is "idle" which meets the requirement.
Step 4 - Send message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username.": Successfully typed and sent the message using the message input field and send button.
Step 5a - GitHub account access card appeared: A "Request Connected Account GitHub" card appeared asking for access permission.
Step 5b - Grant GitHub access: Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access.
Step 6a - API request review appeared: An "API Request Review" card appeared asking to allow "GET /user" request.
Step 6b - Grant API permission: Clicked "Allow" button, then selected "Allow Once" from the permission dialog to grant the API request.
Step 6c - Agent processed request: Agent completed processing and returned to "idle" status after 42 seconds.
Step 7 - Verify response includes GitHub username: Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." confirming successful retrieval of the authenticated user's GitHub username.
